panels.description: Angolo assoluto corrente del busto sul piano avanti/indietro.

targets.query:
import "array"
zero = array.from(rows: [{_time: 1970-01-01T00:00:00Z, _field: "pitch_deg", _value: 0.0}])
live = from(bucket: "posture") |> range(start: -10s) |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "posture" and r._field == "pitch_deg" and r.patient_id == "${patient_id}") |> group(columns: []) |> last() |> keep(columns: ["_time", "_field", "_value"])
union(tables: [zero, live]) |> group(columns: []) |> sort(columns: ["_time"]) |> last()

panels.title: Pitch

panels.description: Angolo assoluto corrente del busto sul piano laterale.

targets.query:
import "array"
zero = array.from(rows: [{_time: 1970-01-01T00:00:00Z, _field: "roll_deg", _value: 0.0}])
live = from(bucket: "posture") |> range(start: -10s) |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "posture" and r._field == "roll_deg" and r.patient_id == "${patient_id}") |> group(columns: []) |> last() |> keep(columns: ["_time", "_field", "_value"])
union(tables: [zero, live]) |> group(columns: []) |> sort(columns: ["_time"]) |> last()

panels.title: Roll

panels.description: Deviazione corrente del pitch rispetto alla calibrazione. Verde: |deviazione| < 10 gradi; giallo: 10-20 gradi; rosso: almeno 20 gradi. Soglie ergonomiche operative, non diagnostiche.

targets.query:
import "array"
zero = array.from(rows: [{_time: 1970-01-01T00:00:00Z, _field: "pitch_deviation_deg", _value: 0.0}])
live = from(bucket: "posture") |> range(start: -10s) |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "posture" and r._field == "pitch_deviation_deg" and r.patient_id == "${patient_id}") |> group(columns: []) |> last() |> keep(columns: ["_time", "_field", "_value"])
union(tables: [zero, live]) |> group(columns: []) |> sort(columns: ["_time"]) |> last()

panels.title: Dev. Pitch

panels.description: Deviazione corrente del roll rispetto alla calibrazione. Verde: |deviazione| < 10 gradi; giallo: 10-20 gradi; rosso: almeno 20 gradi. Soglie ergonomiche operative, non diagnostiche.

targets.query:
import "array"
zero = array.from(rows: [{_time: 1970-01-01T00:00:00Z, _field: "roll_deviation_deg", _value: 0.0}])
live = from(bucket: "posture") |> range(start: -10s) |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "posture" and r._field == "roll_deviation_deg" and r.patient_id == "${patient_id}") |> group(columns: []) |> last() |> keep(columns: ["_time", "_field", "_value"])
union(tables: [zero, live]) |> group(columns: []) |> sort(columns: ["_time"]) |> last()

panels.description: Tempo consecutivo trascorso oltre la soglia di inclinazione avanti/indietro.

live = from(bucket: "posture") |> range(start: -10s) |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "posture" and r._field == "pitch_deviation_duration_seconds" and r.patient_id == "${patient_id}") |> group(columns: []) |> last() |> keep(columns: ["_time", "_field", "_value"])
union(tables: [zero, live]) |> group(columns: []) |> sort(columns: ["_time"]) |> last()

panels.description: Tempo consecutivo trascorso oltre la soglia di inclinazione laterale.

targets.query:
import "array"
zero = array.from(rows: [{_time: 1970-01-01T00:00:00Z, _field: "roll_deviation_duration_seconds", _value: 0.0}])
live = from(bucket: "posture") |> range(start: -10s) |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "posture" and r._field == "roll_deviation_duration_seconds" and r.patient_id == "${patient_id}") |> group(columns: []) |> last() |> keep(columns: ["_time", "_field", "_value"])
union(tables: [zero, live]) |> group(columns: []) |> sort(columns: ["_time"]) |> last()

panels.title: Dev. Roll

panels.description: Stato del flusso live. La maglia e considerata disconnessa dopo 10 secondi senza dati posturali.

targets.query:
import "array"
day = from(bucket: "posture") |> range(start: -10s) |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "posture" and r._field == "pitch_deviation_deg" and r.patient_id == "${patient_id}") |> group(columns: []) |> count() |> map(fn: (r) => ({_time: now(), _field: "connessione", _value: 1}))
night = from(bucket: "posture") |> range(start: -10s) |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "night_position" and r._field == "position_code" and r.patient_id == "${patient_id}") |> group(columns: []) |> count() |> map(fn: (r) => ({_time: now(), _field: "connessione", _value: 1}))
baseline = array.from(rows: [{_time: now(), _field: "connessione", _value: 0}])
union(tables: [baseline, day, night]) |> group(columns: []) |> max(column: "_value")

panels.title: Maglia

panels.description: Livello di carica più recente trasmesso dalla smart shirt.

targets.query:
import "array"
day = from(bucket: "posture") |> range(start: -10s) |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "posture" and r._field == "pitch_deviation_deg" and r.patient_id == "${patient_id}") |> group(columns: []) |> count() |> map(fn: (r) => ({_time: now(), _value: 1}))
night = from(bucket: "posture") |> range(start: -10s) |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "night_position" and r._field == "position_code" and r.patient_id == "${patient_id}") |> group(columns: []) |> count() |> map(fn: (r) => ({_time: now(), _value: 1}))
baseline = array.from(rows: [{_time: now(), _value: 0}])
connected = union(tables: [baseline, day, night]) |> group(columns: []) |> max(column: "_value") |> findRecord(fn: (key) => true, idx: 0)
from(bucket: "posture") |> range(start: -30d) |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "device_status" and r._field == "state_of_charge" and r.patient_id == "${patient_id}") |> group(columns: []) |> last() |> map(fn: (r) => ({r with _value: if connected._value == 1 then float(v: r._value) else -1.0}))

panels.title: Batteria

panels.description: Indica se il monitoraggio posturale diurno è attivo. Durante una sessione notturna resta OFF.

targets.query:
import "array"
day = from(bucket: "posture") |> range(start: -10s) |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "posture" and r._field == "pitch_deviation_deg" and r.patient_id == "${patient_id}") |> group(columns: []) |> count() |> map(fn: (r) => ({_time: now(), _field: "monitoraggio", _value: 1}))
baseline = array.from(rows: [{_time: now(), _field: "monitoraggio", _value: 0}])
union(tables: [baseline, day]) |> group(columns: []) |> max(column: "_value")

panels.title: Monitoraggio

panels.description: Valore pitch visualizzato e acquisito nel momento in cui è stato premuto CALIBRA.

targets.query: from(bucket: "posture") |> range(start: -30d) |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "posture" and r._field == "reference_pitch_deg" and r.patient_id == "${patient_id}") |> group(columns: []) |> last()

panels.title: Cal. Pitch

panels.description: Valore roll visualizzato e acquisito nel momento in cui è stato premuto CALIBRA.

targets.query: from(bucket: "posture") |> range(start: -30d) |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "posture" and r._field == "reference_roll_deg" and r.patient_id == "${patient_id}") |> group(columns: []) |> last()

panels.title: Cal. Roll

panels.description: Calibrazione acquisita dalla postura corrente oppure inserita manualmente.
Evoluzione dell'inclinazione avanti/indietro nel periodo selezionato.

targets.query: from(bucket: "posture") |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop) |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "posture" and r._field == "pitch_deg" and r.patient_id == "${patient_id}") |> group(columns: []) |> set(key: "_field", value: "Pitch") |> sort(columns: ["_time"])

import "array"
inactive = array.from(rows: [{_time: 1970-01-01T00:00:00Z, _value: 0.0, session_id: ""}])
recent = from(bucket: "posture") |> range(start: -10s) |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "posture" and r._field == "pitch_deviation_deg" and r.patient_id == "${patient_id}") |> group(columns: []) |> last() |> keep(columns: ["_time", "_value", "session_id"])
current = union(tables: [inactive, recent]) |> group(columns: []) |> sort(columns: ["_time"]) |> last() |> findRecord(fn: (key) => true, idx: 0)
reference = from(bucket: "posture") |> range(start: -30d) |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "posture" and r._field == "reference_pitch_deg" and r.patient_id == "${patient_id}") |> group(columns: []) |> last() |> findRecord(fn: (key) => true, idx: 0)
array.from(rows: [{_time: v.timeRangeStart, _value: float(v: reference._value), _field: "Calibrazione Pitch"}, {_time: v.timeRangeStop, _value: float(v: reference._value), _field: "Calibrazione Pitch"}]) |> filter(fn: (r) => current.session_id != "")

panels.title: Andamento inclinazione avanti/indietro

panels.description: Evoluzione dell'inclinazione laterale nel periodo selezionato.

targets.query: from(bucket: "posture") |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop) |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "posture" and r._field == "roll_deg" and r.patient_id == "${patient_id}") |> group(columns: []) |> set(key: "_field", value: "Roll") |> sort(columns: ["_time"])

import "array"
inactive = array.from(rows: [{_time: 1970-01-01T00:00:00Z, _value: 0.0, session_id: ""}])
recent = from(bucket: "posture") |> range(start: -10s) |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "posture" and r._field == "pitch_deviation_deg" and r.patient_id == "${patient_id}") |> group(columns: []) |> last() |> keep(columns: ["_time", "_value", "session_id"])
current = union(tables: [inactive, recent]) |> group(columns: []) |> sort(columns: ["_time"]) |> last() |> findRecord(fn: (key) => true, idx: 0)
reference = from(bucket: "posture") |> range(start: -30d) |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "posture" and r._field == "reference_roll_deg" and r.patient_id == "${patient_id}") |> group(columns: []) |> last() |> findRecord(fn: (key) => true, idx: 0)
array.from(rows: [{_time: v.timeRangeStart, _value: float(v: reference._value), _field: "Calibrazione Roll"}, {_time: v.timeRangeStop, _value: float(v: reference._value), _field: "Calibrazione Roll"}]) |> filter(fn: (r) => current.session_id != "")

panels.title: Andamento inclinazione laterale

panels.description: Ultimi eventi posturali rilevati per il paziente selezionato.

targets.query:
import "array"
import "strings"
inactive = array.from(rows: [{_time: 1970-01-01T00:00:00Z, _value: 0.0, session_id: ""}])
recent = from(bucket: "posture") |> range(start: -10s) |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "posture" and r._field == "pitch_deviation_deg" and r.patient_id == "${patient_id}") |> group(columns: []) |> last() |> keep(columns: ["_time", "_value", "session_id"])
current = union(tables: [inactive, recent]) |> group(columns: []) |> sort(columns: ["_time"]) |> last() |> findRecord(fn: (key) => true, idx: 0)
base = from(bucket: "posture") |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop) |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "alerts" and r.patient_id == "${patient_id}") |> filter(fn: (r) => current.session_id != "")
active = base |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "active") |> rename(columns: {_value: "active"}) |> keep(columns: ["_time", "code", "severity", "active"])
messages = base |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "message") |> rename(columns: {_value: "message"}) |> keep(columns: ["_time", "code", "severity", "message"])
join(tables: {active: active, messages: messages}, on: ["_time", "code", "severity"]) |> map(fn: (r) => ({r with alert_name: if r.code == "POSTURE_MARKED_DEVIATION" then "Forte inclinazione" else if r.code == "POSTURE_PROLONGED_DEVIATION" then "Inclinazione troppo lunga" else if r.code == "POSTURE_OK" then "Postura ristabilita" else if r.code == "DATA_STREAM_STALE" then "Nessun dato dalla maglia" else if r.code == "DATA_STREAM_RESTORED" then "Trasmissione ripresa" else if r.code == "BATTERY_CRITICAL" then "Batteria critica (≤10%)" else if r.code == "BATTERY_LOW" then "Batteria bassa (≤20%)" else if r.code == "BATTERY_RECOVERED" then "Batteria recuperata (>20%)" else if r.code == "ACC_SEQUENCE_GAP" then "Pacchetti saltati" else if r.code == "DATA_LOSS" then "Perdita dichiarata dalla maglia" else "Errore non classificato", message: if r.code == "POSTURE_MARKED_DEVIATION" then "Superata la soglia di inclinazione elevata" else if r.code == "POSTURE_PROLONGED_DEVIATION" then "Inclinazione mantenuta oltre il tempo consentito" else if r.code == "POSTURE_OK" then "Postura tornata entro i limiti" else if r.code == "DATA_STREAM_STALE" then "La maglia ha interrotto la trasmissione" else if r.code == "DATA_STREAM_RESTORED" then "La maglia ha ripreso a trasmettere" else if r.code == "BATTERY_CRITICAL" then "Carica residua pari o inferiore al 10%" else if r.code == "BATTERY_LOW" then "Carica residua tra 11% e 20%" else if r.code == "BATTERY_RECOVERED" then "Carica nuovamente superiore al 20%" else if r.code == "ACC_SEQUENCE_GAP" then "Rilevato un salto nella sequenza dei pacchetti" else if r.code == "DATA_LOSS" then "La maglia ha segnalato una perdita di dati" else if strings.strlen(v: r.message) > 55 then strings.substring(v: r.message, start: 0, end: 55) + "…" else r.message})) |> keep(columns: ["_time", "alert_name", "active", "message"]) |> group() |> sort(columns: ["_time"], desc: true) |> limit(n: 30)

panels.title: Alert recenti

list.definition:
import "influxdata/influxdb/schema"
schema.tagValues(bucket: "posture", tag: "patient_id", predicate: (r) => r._measurement == "posture", start: -30d)
list.label: Paziente monitorato
list.name: patient_id
list.query:
import "influxdata/influxdb/schema"
schema.tagValues(bucket: "posture", tag: "patient_id", predicate: (r) => r._measurement == "posture", start: -30d)
